# Yardhunt.ca

> Canada's garage sale and yard sale marketplace. Find and post garage sales across Canada for free.

## What is Yardhunt.ca?

Yardhunt.ca is a free Canadian platform dedicated to garage sales and yard sales. Buyers can browse upcoming sales by city, province, or neighbourhood. Sellers can post their sales with photos, tags, and descriptions.

## Features

- Browse garage sales across Canada
- Search by city, province, neighbourhood, or keyword
- Post a free garage sale listing with photos
- Get email notifications for sales near you
- Featured listings for sellers
- Verified seller badges
- Reviews and Q&A on listings
- Business advertising for local companies

## URLs

- Homepage: https://yardhunt.ca
- Browse sales: https://yardhunt.ca/browse  
- Post a sale: https://yardhunt.ca/post
- Categories: https://yardhunt.ca/categories
- Advertise: https://yardhunt.ca/advertise

## Coverage

Canada-wide including Ontario, Alberta, British Columbia, Quebec, Saskatchewan, Manitoba, Nova Scotia, New Brunswick, PEI, Newfoundland, Northwest Territories, Nunavut, Yukon.
